title: David Grusch Testifies Under Oath on UAP Retrieval Programs
detail: Former intelligence official David Grusch testifies before the House Oversight Committee under oath that the US government has been running a 'multi-decade UAP crash retrieval program' and possesses 'non-human biologics' from recovered craft. Grusch states he was told by individuals with direct knowledge and filed a complaint with the Intelligence Community Inspector General, who found it 'credible and urgent.' Navy pilots Ryan Graves and retired Commander David Fravor also testify about their UAP encounters. The hearing draws bipartisan interest. Members of both parties express alarm at the alleged secrecy and obstruction of congressional oversight. Grusch states he faced retaliation for his disclosures.

media.caption: UFO whistleblower tells Congress the US has alien vehicles
